name: Distance
summary: The Distance class contains methods for calculating the distance between geometric objects.

methods.name: PointToLine
methods.signature: public static double PointToLine(Point Point, Line Line)
methods.summary: Returns the distance between the given point and line.

returns.doc: The distance between the given point and line.

methods.name: PointToLineSegment
methods.signature: public static double PointToLineSegment(Point Point, LineSegment LineSegment)
methods.summary: Returns the distance between the given point and line segment.

params.name: LineSegment
params.doc: The line segment to be used.

returns.doc: The distance between the given point and line segment.

methods.name: PointToPlane
methods.signature: public static double PointToPlane(Point Point, GeometricPlane Plane)
methods.summary: Returns the distance between the given point and plane.

returns.doc: The distance between the given point and plane.

methods.name: PointToPoint
methods.signature: public static double PointToPoint(Point Point1, Point Point2)
methods.summary: Returns the distance between the given two points.

params.name: Point1
params.doc: The first point to be used.

params.name: Point2
params.doc: The second point to be used.

returns.doc: The distance between the given points.
